case_title: COLLINS THOMAS et al VS SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY (TROY MC GHEE)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,196.98 FILED BY COLLINS THOMAS COLLINS EDITH AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY (TROY MC GHEE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO SF HOUSING AUTHORITY RETUNED SIGNED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLINS THOMAS COLLINS EDITH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY (TROY MC GHEE) DEFT TROY MCGHEE DISMISSED FROM THIS ACTION. PLFT SHOULD REFILE NAMING FORMER TENANTS AS DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
